name: PedNStream: Scalable Network Flow Simulation for Pedestrian Traffic Management

description: arXiv:2607.01021v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Evaluating operational crowd management at network scale requires simulations that can be run repeatedly while adapting interventions to changing conditions. Microscopic models can represent detailed individual movement, but their computational cost may limit their use in such repeated, network-scale evaluations. This paper presents PedNStream...
author: Weiming Mai, Dorine Duives, Serge Hoogendoorn
